label: Abuse
clips_caption: A man beats a black dog on the roadside.
The dog recoils while the man continues the attack.
events_summary: An anomaly exists, specifically Abuse. A man physically abuses a black dog on the roadside during the event. The intentional violent harm toward the animal deviates from normal and acceptable behavior.
Abuse030_x264.video_summary: An anomaly exists, specifically Abuse. The video shows a man repeatedly beating a black dog on the roadside from start to end. The deliberate physical harm inflicted on the dog is a clear anomaly and a form of animal abuse.

events_summary_split.description: A man physically abuses a black dog on the roadside during the event.
events_summary_split.analysis: The intentional violent harm toward the animal deviates from normal and acceptable behavior.

video_summary_split.description: The video shows a man repeatedly beating a black dog on the roadside from start to end.
video_summary_split.analysis: The deliberate physical harm inflicted on the dog is a clear anomaly and a form of animal abuse.

label: Assault
Assault011_x264.video_summary: In the yard where many motorcycles are parked, three men beat a man in a pink shirt with a stick.

label: Explosion

label: Explosion

label: Explosion

label: Explosion

label: Explosion
Explosion043_x264.video_summary: The far part of the alley suddenly exploded, producing a fireball. The explosion destroyed the surrounding things. Pedestrians and dogs run away.

label: RoadAccidents
RoadAccidents002_x264.video_summary: A bus rushed to the side of the road and crashed a pillar and then stopped.

label: Shooting
Shooting002_x264.video_summary: In the parking lot at night, a man shot at several others.

label: Shooting
Shooting007_x264.video_summary: On the grass, a man in a blue shirt was holding a gun, and many people shot each other and ran.

label: Shooting
Shooting019_x264.video_summary: At night, two car robbers were scared away by a man who opened fire.

label: Shoplifting
Shoplifting037_x264.video_summary: A man snatched the gold jewelry from the counter while the two shop assistants were not paying attention, and then ran away.
